visual_role: Show the pressure chain from sparse counts to embeddings, recurrent state, fixed-vector seq2seq bottlenecks, attention relief, and the Transformer handoff.
caption: Figure 2.x - The Bottleneck Before The Breakthrough. The diagram shows technical pressures that made attention and Transformer blocks useful; it is not a complete NLP history or priority claim.
blocked_claims: First invention; state-of-the-art rankings; hidden industrial adoption; attention as consciousness; complete NLP history.

visual_role: Show token embeddings, position signal, query/key/value projections, attention weights, value mixing, multi-head branch, and feed-forward/residual wrapper.
caption: Figure 3.x - Attention Is A Mixing Operation, Not A Mind. Self-attention routes information among token positions, but it does not prove intention, truth, grounding, faithful explanation, or modern LLM implementation details.
blocked_claims: Human-like attention; consciousness; full modern decoder-only implementation; distance is free; stable head semantics; solved truth or grounding.

visual_role: Show measured loss, modeled extrapolation, industry interpretation, bounded GPT-3/PaLM examples, and blocked capability/truth/safety/product claims as separate lanes.
caption: Figure 4.x - Loss Is A Map, Not A Product Guarantee. Scaling evidence can support measured loss and compute/data/model tradeoffs, but not automatic truth, safety, product success, or emergence thresholds.
blocked_claims: Exact exponents; plotted Kaplan values; universal token/parameter formula; emergence cliffs; benchmark values; revenue; product success; safety from scale.
